meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how Moviroo collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our platform.

sections.title: Who We Are
sections.description:
Moviroo is a digital ride-hailing platform based in Tunisia that connects passengers with transportation agencies. These agencies employ and manage professional, licensed drivers who carry out the ride services on our behalf. We act as an intermediary technology platform — we do not directly employ drivers, but we are fully responsible for how your data is handled throughout every interaction on our platform.

We are committed to transparency, accountability, and protecting your personal data in accordance with applicable privacy and data protection laws.

sections.title: Scope of This Policy
sections.description: This Privacy Policy applies to all services operated by Moviroo and governs how we collect, process, and store personal data across all our digital touchpoints. It applies regardless of the device or method you use to access our services.

subsections.heading: This policy covers
items: The Moviroo mobile application (iOS and Android)
The Moviroo website and any web-based interfaces
All related backend services, APIs, and integrations
Any future services or features we may launch under the Moviroo brand

subsections.heading: What this policy does not cover
items: Third-party websites or apps linked from our platform
Driver-side applications managed by our partner agencies
Services provided by our payment or mapping partners under their own policies

sections.note: By creating an account or using Moviroo, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of our services.

sections.title: Data We Collect
sections.description: We only collect data that is necessary to operate and improve our services. Below is a detailed breakdown of the categories of personal information we may collect from you.

subsections.heading: Information you provide directly
items: Full name and email address — used to identify your account
Phone number — used for ride coordination and support contact
Profile photo — optional, used to personalize your experience
Payment details — processed securely through third-party providers such as Stripe; we never store raw card numbers
In-app messages or support requests you send us

subsections.heading: Information collected automatically
items: Device type, operating system, and browser version
IP address and approximate network location
App version and session activity logs
Crash reports and diagnostic data
Pages or screens visited and time spent on each

subsections.heading: Location data
items: Real-time GPS coordinates during active rides for navigation and driver matching
Pickup and drop-off addresses you enter when booking
Approximate location when you open the app to show nearby services
Background location only if you have explicitly enabled it in your device settings

subsections.heading: Transaction and ride data
items: Complete history of rides booked, cancelled, or completed
Fare amounts, applied discounts, and payment method used
Driver and agency assigned to each trip
Ratings and reviews you submit after a ride
Timestamps for all booking events

sections.title: Legal Basis for Processing
sections.description: We process your personal data only when we have a valid legal basis to do so. We never process data arbitrarily or without justification. The legal grounds we rely on include:

subsections.heading: Contract performance
items: Processing is necessary to fulfill the ride-booking contract between you and Moviroo
This includes account creation, ride dispatch, payment processing, and customer support

subsections.heading: Your consent
items: For optional features such as marketing communications or background location tracking
You can withdraw consent at any time without affecting prior processing

subsections.heading: Legal obligation
items: When we are required by law to retain or disclose certain data
For example, financial records required under accounting or tax law

subsections.heading: Legitimate interests
items: To improve app performance, detect fraud, and ensure platform security
Only where these interests do not override your fundamental privacy rights

sections.title: How We Use Your Data
sections.description: The data we collect is used solely to deliver, improve, and secure the Moviroo experience. We do not use your data for any purpose that is incompatible with the reason it was originally collected.

subsections.heading: Service delivery
items: Creating and managing your Moviroo account
Processing and confirming ride bookings
Matching you with available drivers through our agency partners
Enabling live ride tracking and in-app navigation
Facilitating payments and issuing receipts

subsections.heading: Safety and fraud prevention
items: Verifying user identity to prevent unauthorized account use
Detecting unusual activity or fraudulent transactions
Monitoring for violations of our Terms of Service
Maintaining records for dispute resolution

subsections.heading: Platform improvement
items: Analyzing app usage to identify and resolve bugs
Understanding feature adoption to prioritize development
Optimizing route suggestions and pricing algorithms
Conducting internal research and analytics (aggregated and anonymized)

subsections.heading: Communication
items: Sending real-time ride status notifications (driver en route, ride started, etc.)
Delivering receipts and transaction confirmations
Responding to support inquiries and complaints
Sending service updates, policy changes, or critical alerts

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.description: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to any third party. We only share your data with parties directly involved in delivering our services, and we share only the minimum information required.

subsections.heading: Partner transportation agencies
items: Your first name and ride details (pickup location, destination, booking time)
Shared solely for the purpose of dispatching and coordinating your ride

subsections.heading: Assigned drivers
items: Your first name only — full name is never shared
Your confirmed pickup and drop-off locations
Your contact number only if operationally required and you have consented

subsections.heading: Payment processors
items: Encrypted payment data transmitted directly to providers such as Stripe
We do not store, log, or have access to your raw card details
Processors operate under their own privacy policies and PCI-DSS compliance standards

subsections.heading: Legal and regulatory authorities
items: We may disclose data when compelled by a valid court order or legal obligation
We will notify you where permitted by law before any such disclosure
We never proactively share data with government entities beyond what is legally required

sections.title: Data Security
sections.description: The security of your data is a top priority. We apply a layered approach to security, combining technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse.

subsections.heading: Technical measures
items: All data in transit is encrypted using HTTPS / TLS protocols
Sensitive data at rest is encrypted using AES-256 or equivalent standards
Payment transactions are handled through PCI-DSS compliant processors
Databases are hosted on secured, access-controlled cloud infrastructure

subsections.heading: Organizational measures
items: Access to personal data is restricted to authorized personnel only
Staff handling user data are trained on data protection best practices
We conduct regular internal reviews of our security practices
Third-party partners are contractually required to maintain equivalent security standards

sections.note: While we apply industry-standard protections, no system is completely immune to risk. We encourage you to use a strong, unique password and to report any suspicious activity on your account immediately at privacy@moviroo.com.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.description: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose it was collected for, or as required by applicable law. Once data is no longer needed, we securely delete or anonymize it.

subsections.heading: Retention schedule
items: Account profile data — retained for the duration of your account; deleted upon verified account deletion request
Ride history — retained for up to 5 years for legal, accounting, and dispute resolution purposes
Payment records — retained as required by applicable financial and tax regulations (typically 7 years)
Support correspondence — retained for up to 3 years after ticket resolution
Usage and analytics logs — anonymized after 12 months and retained in aggregate form indefinitely

sections.note: You may request early deletion of your data at any time. We will honor such requests unless retention is required by law.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.description: Depending on your location and applicable law, you have a number of rights regarding your personal data. We are committed to honoring these rights promptly and transparently.

subsections.heading: Rights you hold
items: Right to Access — Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you
Right to Rectification — Ask us to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
Right to Erasure — Request deletion of your account and associated personal data
Right to Restriction — Ask us to limit processing of your data in certain circumstances
Right to Data Portability — Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Right to Object — Object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing
Right to Withdraw Consent — Revoke any previously given consent at any time

sections.note: To exercise any of these rights, contact our privacy team at privacy@moviroo.com. We will respond within 30 days. In complex cases, we may extend this period by an additional 60 days, but we will inform you if that is the case.

sections.title: International Transfers
sections.description:
Moviroo is based in Tunisia. If we use cloud infrastructure or third-party services with servers located in other countries, your personal data may be transferred internationally. In all such cases, we ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.

Safeguards may include standard contractual clauses, data processing agreements, or reliance on providers who operate under recognized compliance frameworks such as GDPR adequacy decisions.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.description:
Moviroo is designed exclusively for adults aged 18 and above. We do not knowingly collect, process, or store personal data from individuals under the age of 18.

If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has registered on our platform or provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately at privacy@moviroo.com. We will take prompt action to delete the relevant data and close the account.

sections.title: Third-Party Services
sections.description: To deliver a complete and reliable service, Moviroo integrates with a number of trusted third-party providers. Each of these providers operates under their own privacy policies, which we encourage you to review.

subsections.heading: Services we integrate with
items: Payment Gateways (e.g. Stripe) — for secure transaction processing
Google Maps Platform — for ride routing, navigation, and location services
Analytics Tools — for aggregate usage insights and crash reporting
Cloud Hosting Providers — for secure data storage and infrastructure
Customer Support Platforms — for managing support tickets and user communication

sections.note: We carefully vet all third-party partners and require them to uphold data protection standards consistent with our own. However, we are not responsible for the privacy practices of external services once you leave our platform.

sections.title: Policy Changes
sections.description: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our services, business practices, or legal requirements. When we make changes, we will update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page.

subsections.heading: How we notify you
items: Minor changes — updated quietly with a revised date
Material changes — notified via in-app banner or push notification at least 14 days in advance
Significant changes affecting your rights — may require you to re-confirm acceptance before continuing to use the service

sections.note: Continued use of Moviroo after changes become effective constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.description: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests related to this Privacy Policy or the handling of your personal data, our privacy team is here to help. We are committed to responding within 30 days.

subsections.heading: How to reach us
items: Email: privacy@moviroo.com
Company: Moviroo
Address: Tunisia
